feed.title: Erdős Problems — Open → Solved
feed.subtitle: Notifies when an Erdős problem changes from open to solved (proved / disproved / solved), based on the teorth/erdosproblems community database.

entry.title: Problem 469 solved (proved (Lean))
entry.summary: Erdős Problem #469 changed status from “open” to “proved (Lean)”. (database last_update: 2026-07-21)

entry.title: Problem 119 solved (solved)
entry.summary: Erdős Problem #119 changed status from “open” to “solved”. (database last_update: 2025-08-31)

entry.title: Problem 123 solved (proved (Lean))
entry.summary: Erdős Problem #123 changed status from “open” to “proved (Lean)”. (database last_update: 2025-08-31)

entry.title: Problem 320 solved (solved)
entry.summary: Erdős Problem #320 changed status from “open” to “solved”. (database last_update: 2025-08-31)

entry.title: Problem 321 solved (solved)
entry.summary: Erdős Problem #321 changed status from “open” to “solved”. (database last_update: 2025-08-31)

entry.title: Problem 750 solved (proved (Lean))

entry.title: Problem 793 solved (proved (Lean))
